summary_en: Ureru Net Advertising Group to acquire ParrotBeak Co., Ltd. for full subsidiary status via share acquisition. ParrotBeak operates municipal mobile systems and mobile communication services with FY sales of 14.63 billion yen and profitable operations. Transaction structure, purchase price, and completion date not disclosed in basic agreement.
title_en: Notice of Execution of Basic Agreement Regarding Full Subsidiary Acquisition of ParrotBeak Co., Ltd. (Sales 14.63 Billion Yen, Profitable) – Mobile Systems and Mobile Communications Company
translation_en_brief: Ureru Net Advertising Group announced execution of a basic agreement on 28 May 2026 to acquire all shares of ParrotBeak Co., Ltd., making it a wholly owned subsidiary. ParrotBeak operates two core businesses: (1) municipal mobile systems providing mapping and infrastructure management solutions for local governments with long-term contracts and recurring revenue; and (2) mobile communication and SIM/eSIM services for corporate and consumer customers, including inbound roaming and IoT connectivity. ParrotBeak reported annual sales of 14.63 billion yen and profitable operations. The acquisition aims to strengthen Ureru's telecommunications infrastructure capabilities through integration with its existing subsidiary JCNT, which currently operates device rental and corporate communication services. Synergies include combining ParrotBeak's SIM/eSIM product design, sales channels, and operational expertise with JCNT's device sourcing and management capabilities to create unified solutions for municipalities, IoT applications, and corporate segments. The disclosure presents only the basic agreement framework; purchase price, financing terms, and completion schedule were not disclosed.
